title: 続きを進めて。/kernelで。 /kernel verdict を実装に落とします。まず SSOT と gate/test の現状を読み、次に「substitution 禁止・shadow continuity の み許可」を文書化し、最後に静的テストで固定します。 • Updated Plan └ Implement the /kernel-verified fallback policy: forbid baseline substitution by Copilot/Gemini, allow only shadow continuity, and lock it in with do...
summary_text: 1. **Baseline Freeze (start from verified anchor)** - Scope: switch to `local/shadow-continuity-forwardport-chain-20260312` at `4be06effe7ddce8b960a84300ea9bb7e3248080d`, freeze target files, stop exploratory loops. - Hard exit criteria: HEAD matches that commit lineage; target scope is fixed to the 8 files already identified; no new ad-hoc policy edits outside scope. 2. **Gate Enforcement Fix (code-level truth)** - Scope: in `scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh`, make direct-Claude gate truly direct-only (no `fallback_used=true` and no proxy route such as `claude-via-copilot-cli` satisfying direct gate). - Hard exit criteria: any fallback/proxy Claude result cannot satisfy `REQUIRE_DIRECT_CLAUDE_ASSIST` logic; fail-close reason is explicit and deterministic. 3. **Static Test Lock (prevent regression)** - Scope: extend `tests/test-aggregate-tutti-votes.sh` with a case that simulates Claude-via-fallback and asserts direct gate failure; keep local gate tests aligned. - Hard exit criteria: `bash tests/test-aggregate-tutti-votes.sh` and `bash tests/test-local-orchestration-gates.sh` both pass with new assertions. 4. **SSOT + Comment Surface Alignment** - Scope: ensure `AGENTS.md`, `README.md`, `CODEX.md`, and comment output script semantics match enforcement: baseline trio only; shadow continuity visible but non-substitutive. - Hard exit criteria: no remaining wording/enforcement mismatch in reviewed scope; `generate-tutti-comment.sh` reports baseline and shadow continuity as separate concepts. 5. **Forwardport Completion + Evidence Pack** - Scope: finalize on forwardport branch with one coherent patchset and verification evidence. - Hard exit criteria: branch is clean with patch applied on top of the verified base, targeted tests green, and a short lane-evidence summary recorded (implementation lane + independent review lane).
